the_explosion_set: Breaking the ceiling, breaking the wall / Higher than ever, ready to fall
Expanding the energy, faster than light / Striking the center of the digital night
Burst of the logic, burst of the soul / Taking the moment, taking control
the_kinetic_set: Movement is life, static is death / Speed of the transient, speed of the breath
Accelerate the signals, accelerate the mind / Leaving the linear far behind
Zero to one in a millionth of a second / The power of numbers is what I have reckoned
the_expansion_dialogue: Release the force / Ignite the spark
Stay on the course / Inside the dark

psychoacoustic_expansion_v4.the_snap_factor: Parallel Expansion @ 5kHz (+4dB boost on transients only)
psychoacoustic_expansion_v4.the_depth_bounce: Increasing expansion range on reverb-tails during drum-fills
psychoacoustic_expansion_v4.transient_masking_fix: Expander on the high-hats triggered by the snare (ducking then fast-recovery)
